title: TOON Official Specification (toon-format/spec)
author: Johann Schopplich
fetch_notes: Fetched via WebFetch. Extracted version, status, license, syntactic principles, ABNF grammar reference, fixture count.
content_summary: Working Draft v3.0 of TOON specification. Defines formal ABNF grammar, lossless mapping to JSON data model, syntactic rules for tabular arrays, indentation-based nesting, implicit typing, and array length declarations. 358+ conformance test fixtures.
